creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
fw:

I hope you don't mind, while tracking down the issue, I am testing 
with/without ipv6, (since I know that ipv6 modules on a non ipv6 kernel 
has caused problems in the past).

I am doing this testing while waiting for feedback from charls klug.
(I will send a patch in for your approval first.  mostly, it is an 
'extra patch' for if !defined(WITHOUT_IPV6), and a dropping of the ipv6 
socket requirement if so.
it should not affect the default package (since default is WITH_IPV6 )


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
